blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,360 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

recent_conditions.narrative: 19.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
